dialogues: Look at these boxes. Tell me what you see.
How many groups? How many in each group?
Now how many in each group?
That's it. 5 markers in each box. 3 groups of 5. That is how you identify groups and items.
How many in each group? Add the items.
That's it. 2 bags, 3 in each. 2 groups of 3.
Alright, circles. Figure out the groups, then pick the expression that matches.
Right. 4 × 2. Four circles, two dots each. That's how you match groups to the expression.
